trigger.tailwind: w-full flex items-center gap-2 rounded-lg border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-base

calendar.tailwind: absolute mt-1 w-[320px] bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-md z-20 p-4
